nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联312种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等312种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Papuan scrub robin
nodes.summary: The Papuan scrub robin or New Guinea scrub robin (Drymodes beccarii) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae. It was found to be genetically distinct from the northern scrub robin, with which it was formerly considered conspecific. It is found in New Guinea and the Aru Islands. There are three subspecies. D. b. beccarii (Salvadori, 1876) – Arfak and Wandammen Mountains, western New Guinea D. b. brevirostris (De Vis, 1897) – southern and south-eastern New Guinea with the Aru Islands D. b. nigriceps (Rand, 1940) – northern New Guinea eastwards to Telefomin, with the Torricelli Mountains and Adelbert Range References

nodes.name: Drymodes
nodes.summary: Drymodes（Drymodes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Northern scrub robin、Papuan scrub robin、Southern scrub robin。
